name: BEN_DIAG_FF_ATCHMNT_G4_V
query: SELECT NAME "Object Name", 'Plan' "Object Type", 'BEN_ENRT_PERD' "Table Name", 'RT_END_DT_RL' "Column Name", FFL.FORMULA_NAME "Formula Name", FFL.FORMULA_ID "Formula Id", FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_NAME "Formula Type Name", FFT.FORMULA_TYPE_ID "Formula Type Id", TO_DATE(NULL) "Effective Start Date", TO_DATE(NULL) "Effective End Date" , FFL.ENTERPRISE_ID "Enterprise ID" FROM BEN_PL_F PLN,BEN_POPL_ENRT_TYP_CYCL POPL,BEN_ENRT_PERD ENP,FF_FORMULAS_F FFL, FF_FORMULA_TYPES FFT WHERE PLN.PL_ID=POPL.PL_ID AND POPL.POPL_ENRT_TYP_CYCL_ID=ENP.POPL_ENRT_TYP_CYCL_ID AND
